hooks.description: Stop hook: observability + opt-in nudge for the meta/next-steps closing. Always appends one next_steps event to ~/.config/cue/analytics.jsonl (was the turn substantive? did it end with a Next steps block?) so adoption is measurable. Only warns (stderr, never blocks) when ${HOME}/.config/cue/next-steps-nudge exists. Off by default. Fail-open; suppress one turn with [skip-next-steps].
